character.name: An older lady with long,
character.prompt: An older lady with long, straight black hair (reaching her waist) and a gentle, aged expression. She wears a lavender purple, ankle-length, bohemian maxi dress. The dress is characterized by flowing balloon sleeves gathered at the wrists and a deep V-neckline. The pattern should be represented by clusters of purple, white, and blue pixel art dither, with a distinct horizontal band of color clusters across the midriff and a tiered look at the very bottom hem. Large, chunky bronze-gold cuff bracelets with a distinct turquoise stone detail are visible on both wrists, and multiple heavy rings are on her fingers. She is standing barefoot. The character should be rendered in a clean, retro 8-bit (or 16-bit) pixel art style.
